summary: Fix podcast review findings around runtime payloads, manifest output, timing, quota checks, and show-bible updates.
reason: Greptile review identified runtime defects in the hand-authored podcast suite: CLI defaults overwrote script front matter, generated music/SFX requests used string values for numeric API fields, resume hashes ignored voice assignments, VTT conversion corrupted transcript text, clip cuts ignored STT word timing, over-quota accounts skipped budget gating, auto runs dropped show context, and voice design appended duplicate speaker blocks.
validated_outcome: go build ./...; go vet ./...; go test ./...; govulncheck ./...; python3 .github/scripts/verify-skill/verify_skill.py --dir library/ai/elevenlabs/
